Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are given several tables and need to create an event log for process mining. The case ID is the order_id. We need to derive activities and timestamps from the tables.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Steps: 1. For each order, we start with an Order Created event from the Orders table using order_date. 2. For each order line, we have an Items Picked event.

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We have two options: a. Create one event per item picking (with the item and picker) -> more detailed. b. Aggregate by order and take the maximum picking date as the time the order was fully picked -> less detailed but simpler. Given that we are in a process mining context and we want to capture the individual picking activities, well go with one event per item picking.

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: From the Delivery table, we have two events: Order Dispatched and Order Arrived. Note: There might be multiple deliveries per order (split shipments). Well create an event for each dispatch and arrival. From the Invoice table, we have Invoice Issued event(s) for an order. Note that an order might have multiple invoices. From the Payments table, we have Payment Received event(s) for an invoice. Note that an invoice might have multiple payments.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to output a table with columns: Case ID, Activity Name, Timestamp, Resource/Actor, and other attributes. Well create the events in the following way: - Activity: Order Created Timestamp: order_date Resource: sales_person_id

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: For the Payment Received events: Resource: payment_method (or we can leave blank if we dont have a person) -> note: the payments table doesnt have a person, so well use the payment method as the resource or leave it blank. Well use the payment method.

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We are going to combine all these events and then sort by case_id and timestamp. However, note that the same order might have multiple events of the same type (e.g., multiple item pickings). Well keep them all.

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 1004: - Order Created: 2024-01-04T14:15:00Z, Resource: SP-003 (Charlie Kim, Sales Person) - Item Picked: 2024-01-06T08:00:00Z, Resource: WH-002 (Eva Johnson, Warehouse Staff), Item: ITEM-001, Quantity: 5 - No delivery, invoice, or payment for order 1004? We dont have data for these, so we stop here.
